summary: Iteration 11 — Verified the new force-rebuild operational button on /back-office/webhooks + backend pytest regression and POST /api/admin/feed/rebuild smoke. Backend: 112/112 pytest PASS under MITTARI_DISABLE_WORKERS=1 MITTARI_DISABLE_SCHEDULER=1 (--ignore=tests/test_phase3a_v2_content.py). Direct curl POST /api/admin/feed/rebuild with X-Admin-Token=mittari-admin returned the exact contract {rebuilt_at, candidates:216, upserted:216, pruned:0, signals_scanned:200, published_scanned:40} — endpoint shape unchanged. Frontend (Playwright @1920×1080): auth gate unlocked via password input + UNLOCK button using token 'mittari-admin'; webhooks-force-rebuild-panel renders BETWEEN webhooks-pubsub-lease-panel and webhook-source-row-twitch (compareDocumentPosition verified). Header reads 'SYÖTTEEN UUDELLEENRAKENNUS'; button label 'PAKOTA SYÖTTEEN UUDELLEENRAKENNUS'. First-visit stamp 'VIIMEISIN AJO · EI VIELÄ AJETTU' confirmed after localStorage clear. Click → button became disabled with label 'AJETAAN…' (in-flight state captured at 100ms). After resolve, webhooks-force-rebuild-stats grid shows EXACTLY 5 children: rebuild-stat-candidates(216), rebuild-stat-upserted(216), rebuild-stat-pruned(0), rebuild-stat-signals(200), rebuild-stat-published(40). Stamp updated to 'VIIMEISIN AJO · 2026-05-17 10:54:48 UTC'. localStorage key 'mittari-admin-last-feed-rebuild' persisted with rebuilt_at + all 5 counters. After reload + re-auth, stamp + stats grid both still rendered. webhooks-force-rebuild-error count = 0 throughout success path (conditional render confirmed absent on success).

verified_features.frontend_in_flight_state: PASS — button.disabled=true and label='AJETAAN…' during in-flight POST
verified_features.frontend_stamp_update: PASS — updated to 'VIIMEISIN AJO · 2026-05-17 10:54:48 UTC' after success
verified_features.frontend_error_branch_absent_on_success: PASS — webhooks-force-rebuild-error count=0 throughout success path

critical_code_review_comments: BackOfficeWebhooks.jsx Stat helper + force-rebuild panel cleanly inserted between lease panel and source rows — ordering matches spec.
localStorage write happens inside onForceRebuild on success and on initial useState lazy init read; both branches stable. No XSS risk because no innerHTML usage on stored value.

Spec says 'honest error surface on 5xx'. Verified webhooks-force-rebuild-error is conditionally rendered (count=0 on success). Per review_request, simulating 5xx with valid token was explicitly out of scope (no backend mock harness available). Code path looks correct: rebuildError state is set on !r.ok via setRebuildError; rendered only when truthy and rebuildResult is also gated by !rebuildError so stale stats don't survive a failure.

Minor: rebuildResult is restored from localStorage on mount, so a stale-on-disk error scenario could surface old stats if backend later fails — acceptable for this operational tool but worth documenting; the latest error always takes precedence in the UI because rebuildError clears rebuildResult render via the && !rebuildError guard.

seed_scheduler.py F841 cleanup (unused 'cfg = CONTENT_TYPES[content_type]') did not affect tests — 112/112 still green. Note: grep still shows 'cfg = CONTENT_TYPES[content_type]' at line 369 of current file; if main agent meant a different unused assignment, that one survives. Either way, pytest is green so no regression.
test_credentials: X-Admin-Token: mittari-admin (BACK_OFFICE_TOKEN, used for /api/admin/feed/rebuild and /back-office/webhooks auth gate)
seed_data_creation: Single POST /api/admin/feed/rebuild via UI click upserted 216 candidates (200 signals + 40 published, dedup) — same shape as iteration_10 (218 prior → 216 now after natural TTL).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Force-rebuild panel fully verified end-to-end. Auth gate on /back-office/webhooks requires UNLOCK click after password fill — localStorage pre-seed of 'mittari-admin-token' alone does NOT bypass gate (component reads input state). Always type token into input then click the UNLOCK button (or press Enter). Backend rebuild endpoint stable. localStorage key for persistence: 'mittari-admin-last-feed-rebuild'.
